description: Originally launched on Solana in Q4 2024, Grass (GRASS) is a token for a decentralized AI data project designed to power intelligent Web3 applications. As a 1:1 price-indexing token on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — ATC-20 GRASS gives original GRASS holders, users and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, and AI contract capability for faster, more secure, and more scalable use worldwide.
name: Grass
